channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Litter all over pavement., 29th May
item.description:
Litter all over pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dorothy Road, Clapham Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement blocked, 29th May
item.description:
Tree/bush is blocking the pavement forcing people into the road. Further down there is more vegetation spilling onto pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 29th May
item.description:
Fly tip of painted tyres on kerb by the mitre pub
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 164, Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter left by verge, 29th May
item.description:
More senseless littering. Perhaps a bin could be placed along here where motorists park.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Mead Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags fly tipped, 29th May
item.description:
The foxes have been ‘at’ these black bags and strewn some of the contents in the vicinity nd it looks terrible, a real mess. Surely there can be an address or something to identify whoever put all this there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Road, Hextable, Sevenoaks
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lower branches require pruning., 29th May
item.description:
Causing obstruction to pedestrians walking up & down Queensway.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queensway, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter litter litter everywhere, 29th May
item.description:
Enfield council please now start doing something and deliver on your promises

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Park Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown bush on Sandhurst Road, 29th May
item.description:
Overgrown bush on Sandhurst Road obscuring signage and blocking pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Sandhurst Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old carpet blocking fire exit, 29th May
item.description:
Flat 13 oyster court (85 Crampton st) have had their carpet removed and left the old carpet on the street. This is a fire risk and a tripping hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 85, Crampton Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish covers the street, 29th May
item.description:
Better and more thorough and frequent cleaning needed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Park Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked for a few weeks, 29th May
item.description:
Benches been parked for a few weeks and is often stationary for a long time.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Elibank Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plenty of uncollected rubbish on street and pavement, 29th May
item.description:
Street cleaning team not doing their job properly, and rubbish remains on the street even after street cleaning has supposedly happened..

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Park Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bottles and bags of household rubbish at the back of the fence of number 27, Marshall Path, 29th May
item.description:
These bags of household rubbish, box, paint container and bottles have been there for the past three weeks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marshall Path, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping and mess!, 29th May
item.description:
Please clean this up!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tom Cribb Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chair, Cooler and airer behind the fence, 29th May
item.description:
Torn chair, broken airer and tv left behind the fence

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marshall Path, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Council street cleaning waste abandoned for 2 weeks attracting fly tipping and bins permanently stored on pavement, 29th May
item.description:
Bagged waste left by council street cleaners for over 2 weeks has attracted fly tipping compounded by private bins permanently stored on public pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich Park Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain water causing severe smells and rodents such as rats, 29th May
item.description:
The drain that services 1 and 1A falconwood parade is blocked before hitting the main sewer. The wastewater has caused sewage to spread across the service road and is now causing a foul smell in the heat and attracting vermin such as rats. To my knowledge the neighbours have asked the occupiers of the business and privately rented residential property to address with no action over the past two months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Green, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Untaxed Vehicle, 29th May
item.description:
Untaxed white van abandoned in a Peabody residents car park.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kentlea Road, Abbey Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerouse, 29th May
item.description:
These covers are broken someone could catch there foot in them and brake an ankle. You just seem to cover them in tarmac. Im not sure what they are for but surley they should be replaced with like for like.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Graham Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish thrown, 29th May
item.description:
There has been rubbish just thrown on the gate. The previous cot is still there and has not been taken away. You can still see it in the picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Verdant Lane, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
